generated_oml:
// C3: Physical Sensing Components
instance OccupancySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Environmental sensor capturing occupancy data in academic/commercial buildings via IoT networks"
    DTDFVocab:producedData OccupancyTelemetryData
]

instance TemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Environmental sensor measuring temperature conditions for BCS optimization"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureTelemetryData
]

instance HumiditySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Environmental sensor tracking humidity levels for indoor climate control"
    DTDFVocab:producedData HumidityTelemetryData
]

instance LightLevelSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Light intensity sensor for adaptive lighting control systems"
    DTDFVocab:producedData LightingTelemetryData
]

instance EnergyConsumptionMonitor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Device-specific sensor tracking energy usage of building systems"
    DTDFVocab:producedData EnergyUsageTelemetryData
]

instance ActuatorFeedbackSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor capturing feedback from lighting/HVAC actuators for real-time synchronization"
    DTDFVocab:producedData ActuatorStateTelemetryData
]

// C4: Physical-to-Virtual Interaction
instance OccupancyTelemetryData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom OccupancySensor
]

instance TemperatureTelemetryData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TemperatureSensor
]

instance HumidityTelemetryData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HumiditySensor
]

instance LightingTelemetryData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom LightLevelSensor
]

instance EnergyUsageTelemetryData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom EnergyConsumptionMonitor
]

instance ActuatorStateTelemetryData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom ActuatorFeedbackSensor
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance BimEnrichedWithDeviceMetadata : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "BIM models enriched with device metadata (sensor/actuator configurations, control logic) via model-driven transformations"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ModelTransformationEngine
]

instance IoTSensorTelemetryData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time IoT sensor telemetry (occupancy, environmental conditions) ingested via Eclipse Hono/Ditto"
    DTDFVocab:fromData OccupancyTelemetryData, TemperatureTelemetryData, HumidityTelemetryData, LightingTelemetryData, EnergyUsageTelemetryData, ActuatorStateTelemetryData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHonoProtocol, EclipseDittoFramework
]

instance ReinforcementLearningControlPolicies : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Reinforcement learning policies (BOREALIS) for adaptive building systems control"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PythonRIntegrationLayer
]

instance UnrealEngine5VisualizationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "High-fidelity 3D visualization model for immersive monitoring and simulation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo UnrealEngine5Integration
]

instance BcsRuntimeData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Runtime data from Building Control Systems (sensor configurations, occupancy patterns)"
    DTDFVocab:fromData IoTSensorTelemetryData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ReinforcementLearningControlPolicies, TwinLightControlLogic
]

// C11: Enablers
instance ModelTransformationEngine : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-driven engineering tool performing model-to-model/text transformations to generate runtime artifacts from BIM"
    DTDFVocab:enables BimToRuntimeArtifactGenerationService
]

instance EclipseHonoProtocol : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Lightweight M2M service protocol for real-time IoT data exchange between Physical Twin and Digital Twin"
    DTDFVocab:enables IoTDataIngestionService, RealTimeDataSynchronizationService
]

instance EclipseDittoFramework : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Digital twin framework providing device connectivity, digital twin management, and bidirectional communication"
    DTDFVocab:enables DigitalTwinConnectivityService, BidirectionalControlService
]

instance UnrealEngine5Integration : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "High-fidelity 3D visualization engine for interactive monitoring and simulation"
    DTDFVocab:enables ImmersiveMonitoringService, WhatIfSimulationService
]

instance PythonRIntegrationLayer : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Interface layer for integrating reinforcement learning libraries (BOREALIS) via Python/R"
    DTDFVocab:enables AdaptiveControlService, PredictiveAnalyticsService
]

instance TwinLightControlLogic : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Control configuration semantics for lighting and BCS components"
    DTDFVocab:enables AutomatedLightingControlService, BcsOptimizationService
]

// C6: Services
instance BimToRuntimeArtifactGenerationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service generating runtime artifacts (Hono/Ditto configurations, Unreal Engine assets) from enriched BIM models"
    DTDFVocab:provides BimTransformationInsight
]

instance IoTDataIngestionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service handling real-time IoT sensor telemetry ingestion via Eclipse Hono"
    DTDFVocab:provides DataIngestionInsight
]

instance RealTimeDataSynchronizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service maintaining bidirectional synchronization between PT sensor data and DT virtual representation"
    DTDFVocab:provides SynchronizationInsight
]

instance DigitalTwinConnectivityService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service managing device connectivity and digital twin management via Eclipse Ditto"
    DTDFVocab:provides ConnectivityInsight
]

instance BidirectionalControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service enabling control signals from DT to physical actuators (lighting/HVAC)"
    DTDFVocab:provides ControlSignalAction
]

instance ImmersiveMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service providing 3D visualization of sensor data and system states in Unreal Engine 5"
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizationInsight
]

instance WhatIfSimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service enabling model-driven simulations to evaluate design/operational changes"
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationInsight
]

instance AdaptiveControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service executing reinforcement learning policies for adaptive building systems"
    DTDFVocab:provides AdaptiveControlAction
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service performing predictive analytics (energy optimization, occupancy forecasting)"
    DTDFVocab:provides PredictiveInsight
]

instance AutomatedLightingControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service managing automated lighting control based on BIM-embedded semantics"
    DTDFVocab:provides LightingControlAction
]

instance BcsOptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service optimizing Building Control Systems based on runtime data"
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimizationInsight
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance BimTransformationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight about successfully transformed BIM models into runtime artifacts"
]

instance DataIngestionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight about real-time IoT data ingestion status and quality"
]

instance SynchronizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight about synchronization status between physical and virtual representations"
]

instance ConnectivityInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight about device connectivity and digital twin management status"
]

]

    base:desc "Insight about immersive 3D visualization of building systems"

]

    base:desc "Action executing reinforcement learning policies for adaptive control"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

    base:desc "Insight about predictive analytics results (energy optimization, occupancy forecasting)"
]

    base:desc "Action adjusting lighting systems based on BIM-embedded semantics"

]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The DT generates **control signals and commands** that are transmitted back to the physical twin (PT) via **bidirectional communication channels** enabled by **Eclipse Hono/Ditto**. Key interactions include:
  1. **Actuator commands**: The DT sends **real-time control signals** (e.g., lighting adjustments, HVAC setpoints) to **BCS actuators** in the PT, leveraging **automated model-driven transformations** from BIM to runtime artifacts.
  2. **Reinforcement learning policies**: In the **BOREALIS** project, the DT dynamically adjusts lighting control strategies based on **sensor feedback and occupancy data**, optimizing for **energy efficiency, visual comfort, and non-visual health effects**.
  3. **Automated commissioning**: The **TwinLight** framework enables **automated device configuration** by translating BIM-embedded control semantics into **runtime deployment scripts** for physical systems.
  These interactions are supported by **standardized extension points** in the DT architecture, allowing for **modular service integration** (e.g., custom analytics, adaptive control algorithms)."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The twinning time scale is characterized by **real-time synchronization** between the physical and digital twins, with a focus on **near-real-time data exchange** for operational decision-making. The **BOREALIS** project demonstrates iterative refinement of control policies using **post-occupancy sensor data**, implying a **sub-minute to hourly** time scale for adaptive adjustments. The **TwinLight** framework supports **immediate bidirectional communication** for lighting control, while **Unreal Engine 5** enables **interactive visualization** with minimal latency. The exact time intervals are not specified, but the emphasis is on **low-latency synchronization** to support real-time control and monitoring."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The DT constellation is a **service-oriented, modular architecture** orchestrating:
  1. **Core components**:
     - **BIM-based semantic layer**: Provides **spatial, functional, and control semantics** for the PT.
     - **IoT connectivity layer**: **Eclipse Hono/Ditto** for **real-time data ingestion and actuator control**.
     - **Runtime execution layer**: **Automated deployment** of **control logic, analytics, and visualization**.
  2. **Extension points**: **Standardized interfaces** for integrating **third-party services** (e.g., **energy optimization tools, predictive maintenance algorithms**).
  3. **Visualization layer**: **Unreal Engine 5** for **immersive 3D interaction** with the DT.
  4. **Lifecycle management**: **Automated synchronization** between **BIM, IoT, and DT** across **design, construction, and operation phases**.
  The constellation supports **scalable deployment** from **single buildings to entire infrastructure portfolios**, with **decentralized service integration** for **flexibility and extensibility**."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The DT covers **multiple lifecycle stages** of the physical twin (PT), from **design to operation and refurbishment**:
  1. **Design phase**: Leverages **BIM models** as the **semantic backbone**, incorporating **geometric, spatial, and functional data** for initial DT setup.
  2. **Construction phase**: Supports **clash detection, progress tracking, and as-built documentation** via **real-time synchronization** with construction data.
  3. **Operation phase**: Enables **real-time monitoring, predictive maintenance, and adaptive control** (e.g., **BOREALIS’s reinforcement learning for lighting optimization**).
  4. **Refurbishment/retrofit**: Facilitates **what-if analysis** for design changes and **lifecycle cost assessments** before physical implementation.
  The DT’s **dynamic nature** allows it to **evolve alongside the PT**, with **runtime updates** (e.g., new sensor integration, control policy adjustments) without requiring full redeployment. The **Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric** is used to **quantify the DT’s alignment with the PT** across these stages."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity and validity are assessed using the **Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric**, which measures the alignment between the digital twin and its physical counterpart. The framework addresses **semantic drift** (divergence between models) through:
  1. **Automated synchronization** of sensor data and control logic.
  2. **Model validation** to ensure consistency between BIM and runtime artifacts.
  3. **Bidirectional communication** to maintain real-time coherence.
  While the document does not detail specific uncertainty management or human-in-the-loop validation, the ODTE metric provides a **quantitative measure** of DT fidelity, and the **model-driven approach** ensures **structural integrity** throughout the lifecycle."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin system establishes technical connections via **Eclipse Hono** and **Ditto**, which provide **real-time, bidirectional communication** between physical assets and the virtual twin. These tools support **standardized protocols** for data exchange, ensuring interoperability with heterogeneous IoT devices and Building Control Systems (BCS). The framework does not specify exact network protocols (e.g., MQTT, CoAP) but relies on Hono/Ditto’s native support for **event-driven architectures** and **cloud-edge connectivity**. The connection is designed to be **scalable and modular**, accommodating both centralized and decentralized deployment scenarios."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The DT is deployed in a **modular, service-oriented architecture** with:
  1. **Standardized extension points** for integrating custom services.
  2. **Unreal Engine 5** for **visualization hosting**.
  3. **Eclipse Hono/Ditto** for **runtime execution** and **data management**.
  The document does not specify cloud/edge deployment or automated pipelines, but the framework prioritizes **scalability** and **modularity** to support **evolving operational requirements**. The **model-driven approach** ensures **reproducible deployments** with minimal manual effort."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Horizontal integration is supported through:
  1. **Standardized extension points** for **service integration** (e.g., third-party analytics, AI models).
  2. **BIM interoperability** to ensure compatibility with **AECO-specific tools** (e.g., Revit, ArchiCAD).
  3. **IoT platform agnosticism** via **Eclipse Hono/Ditto**, enabling connection to **heterogeneous sensor networks**.
  The document does not specify APIs, cloud data lakes, or event-driven architectures but implies **modularity** and **interoperability** as key enablers for external system integration."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The framework adheres to:
  1. **BIM standards** for **semantic modeling** and **data exchange**.
  2. **Eclipse Hono/Ditto** for **IoT and DT interoperability**.
  The document does not specify exact standards (e.g., IFC, OPC UA) but emphasizes **BIM-centric** and **open-source** tools for **domain-specific integration**. The **model-driven approach** ensures **consistency** with AECO workflows and **scalable deployment**."
]
